title: ecbolium laetum
intro: Ecbolium laetum, also known as the happy creeping thyme, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The medicinal properties of Ecbolium laetum have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Ecbolium laetum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat various health conditions.
